===================
=== bd1989-08-23_oklahoma_city.txt
===================
===================
===================
The Zoo Amphitheatre, Oklahoma City, Oklahoma, 23/08/89

Disc I:

Most Likely You Go Your Way (And I'll Go Mine)
Man Gave Names To All The Animals (with harp)
John Brown
I Want You (with harp)
Simple Twist Of Fate (with harp)
Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again
@ It's All Over Now, Baby Blue (with harp)	

Disc II: 
@ One Too Many Mornings (with harp)
@ It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding)
Rank Strangers To Me (Albert Brumley) (starts acoustic, ends electric)
Positively 4th Street
I Shall Be Released
Like A Rolling Stone
@ Mr. Tambourine Man (with harp)
Maggie's Farm

Originates from LB-719 (which was in shn). I removed silence between first and second track on disc one, plus silence after "It's All Over now..", "Like A Rolling Stone" and at the beginning of "Tambourine Man".
===================
===================
===================
